theme_archetype.vibe: Professional, premium, high-tech, precise 'Control Room' feel.

layout_strategy.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-16 md:py-24

bento_grid.structure: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6 auto-rows-[220px]

tool_cards.style: Glassmorphism with 'Optical Clarity'. Use sharp 1px borders (border-white/5 for inner reflection, border-zinc-800/50 for structure). Use flex column, justify-between logic.
tool_cards.badges: Use the 'overline' typography with the accent secondary colors (cyan). Place them at the top right of the card to indicate 'AI' powered.

inline_forms.style: When a card is clicked, it expands to reveal a focused 'Control Room' form. Use deeply dark inputs (bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800).
inline_forms.file_upload: Dashed border dropzone (border-zinc-700 hover:border-zinc-500) with a centered icon. Text should prompt drag & drop.
inline_forms.buttons: Brutalist high-contrast (bg-white text-zinc-950 font-semibold tracking-tight hover:bg-zinc-200) for processing actions. Do not use generic blue buttons.

motion_interactions.card_hover: Subtle scale effect (scale-[1.02] or scale-[1.01]) and border opacity increase. Utilize Framer Motion 'whileHover'. If possible, implement a CSS spotlight effect that follows the cursor.
motion_interactions.inline_expansion: Use Framer Motion's <AnimatePresence> and layout transitions. When clicked, the card expands smoothly (height: auto), hiding the standard description and revealing the interactive form.
motion_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-in and slight slide-up (y: 20 -> 0) for the bento grid items using Framer Motion variants.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup standard tailwind configuration for a Dark theme using Zinc as the neutral scale. Ensure Outfit and IBM Plex Sans fonts are available.
2. Implement the Page Container with a pure black/zinc-950 background and the subtle radial gradient as specified in 'color_system.background'.

3. Build the Bento Grid layout precisely matching the col-span and row-span definitions in 'layout_strategy.bento_grid'. DO NOT use a uniform 3x3 grid; this dynamic bento layout is critical for the premium feel.
4. Create the ToolCard component using Framer Motion. Apply the 'Optical Clarity' glassmorphism styles. The icon goes top-left, 'AI' badge top-right, title and description bottom-left.

5. Integrate inline form logic: Clicking a ToolCard sets it as 'active'. The card expands using Framer Motion's layout animations. When expanded, hide the short description and reveal the upload dropzone and options form.
6. Style the inline form heavily: use high-contrast white buttons (bg-white text-black) for the primary 'Process' CTA. Avoid standard SaaS blue.
7. Add `data-testid` to all tool cards, buttons, and form inputs for testing compliance. Ensure proper accessibility focus states.
